message:
fix(lifecycle,ci): allow cleanup task spawn in FINALIZING regions, enrich evidence linkage

lifecycle: Widen task admission from asx_region_can_spawn (OPEN-only) to
asx_region_can_accept_work (OPEN+FINALIZING) so finalizer-spawned cleanup
work is admitted during the FINALIZING phase. Obligation reservation remains
OPEN-only via asx_region_can_spawn. Updated transition.h doc comments to
clarify the distinction.

tests: Add three new quiescence tests covering cleanup spawn in FINALIZING
regions (standard, captured, and obligation-rejection negative case).

beads: Enrich 175 bead close_reasons with evidence linkage references
(unit_tests, e2e_or_invariant, artifacts). lint-evidence gate now passes
with 261/261 beads, 0 warnings, 0 violations. bd-uk62, bd-xd06 closed.

Guarantee Impact Block:
- gs_id: GS-006
- change: Widen task spawn admission to include FINALIZING state; enrich
  bead close_reason metadata with evidence linkage references (data-only).
- preserved invariants: Obligation reservation remains OPEN-only. Region
  lifecycle transition table unchanged. Deterministic scheduling, replay
  identity, and semantic digest stability preserved for all existing
  scenarios. No existing test behavior changes.
- proof artifacts: tests/unit/runtime/test_quiescence.c, tests/e2e/e2e_core_lifecycle.c
- fallback mode: Revert lifecycle.c to use asx_region_can_spawn restores
  strict OPEN-only admission if FINALIZING spawn causes issues.
- deterministic isomorphism note: Only behavioral change is admitting tasks
  in FINALIZING state; all other state transitions identical. Beads JSONL
  change is metadata-only with no runtime effect.
- semantic delta budget: 0
- traceability refs: TRC-SEM-001, TRC-LIFECYCLE-001
- artifact links: build/conformance/, tools/ci/artifacts/conformance/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
